summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CarouselEx AI Content Studio app - backend APIs and frontend UI fully functional
passed_tests: Backend /api/health endpoint returns correct CarouselEx service name
Backend /api/brand GET and PUT operations working correctly
Backend /api/library GET and POST /api/library/save working correctly
Backend /api/cic POST endpoint with mode='generate' working with GPT-5.2
Backend /api/cic POST endpoint with mode='rewrite' working correctly
CarouselEx branding appears correctly in sidebar logo
All 6 sidebar navigation items present: Home, Create Content, Smart Rewrite, Content Library, Brand Style, Settings
Home page shows CarouselEx heading, input textarea, 3 quick-start chips (Carousel, Poll Content, Viral Post), Start Creating button
Home page Start Creating button navigates to /dashboard/create correctly
Create Content page shows 4 content type options (carousel, poll, viral-post, thread), generate button, paste mode toggle
Smart Rewrite page shows textarea input, 4 rewrite style options, Rewrite Content button
Content Library page shows empty state with 'No content yet' and Create Content button
Brand Style page shows tone selector, writing style selector, niche input, save button, info card
Settings page shows working tabs: profile, billing, security
Demo authentication working with any email/password (demo@carouselex.com / demo123)
All navigation between pages working correctly
